nameMeanings.name: López
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Juan, Manuel, Carlos, Luis, Jesus, Francisco, Pedro, Miguel, Jorge, Raul, Ramon, Mario.
Spanish (López): patronymic from the medieval personal name Lope ‘wolf’. This is one of the commonest of all Spanish surnames. In the US, it is the twelfth most frequent surname. Compare De Lopez .

Jewish (Sephardic): adoption of the Spanish surname (see 1 above) at the moment of conversion to Roman Catholicism. After the return to Judaism (generations later), some descendants retained the name their families used as Catholics.

variants.name: Lopes
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Carlos, Fernando, Luis, Julio, Mario, Americo, Armando, Jorge, Alvaro, Ana.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Ilidio, Martinho, Paulo, Serafim, Anabela, Duarte, Mateus, Aderito, Afonso, Agostinho.
Portuguese and Galician: patronymic from the medieval personal name Lopo (from Latin lupus ‘wolf’).
Spanish: variant or altered form of López (see Lopez ).

variants.name: Lope
meanings: Spanish: from the old personal name Lope, from Latin lupus ‘wolf’.

nameMeanings.name: Sancha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: spelling of Sasha, Russian pet form of Alexander and Alexandra .

historicEvents.description: The Christian territory controlled the Kingdoms of Aragon, Navarre, and Castile.

en.lifeSummary: Sancha López was born about 1115, in Basque Country, Spain. She had at least 5 sons and 6 daughters with Íñigo López II Señor de Llodio.

fr.lifeSummary: Sancha López est née environ 1115, à Euskadi, Espagne. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles avec Íñigo López II Señor de Llodio.

de.lifeSummary: Sancha López wurde um 1115 in Euskadi, Spanien geboren. Sie hatte mit Íñigo López II Señor de Llodio mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Sancha López è nata il circa 1115 nel Euskadi, Spagna. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie con Íñigo López II Señor de Llodio.

ja.lifeSummary: Sancha Lópezは約1115年にスペインエウスカジーで生まれた。彼女はÍñigo López II Señor de Llodioとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Sancha López(은)는 대략 1115년 스페인 우스카디에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Íñigo López II Señor de Llodio(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sancha López nasceu aproximadamente 1115, em Euskadi, Espanha. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas com Íñigo López II Señor de Llodio.

ru.lifeSummary: Sancha López родилась около 1115 г. в местности эускади, Испания. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей от Íñigo López II Señor de Llodio.

es.lifeSummary: Sancha López nació aproximadamente 1115, en País Vasco, España. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas con Íñigo López II Señor de Llodio.
